body.title: Seed palace.decisions.* from existing D-*.md stubs
body.result: 61 D-*.md files seeded into palace.decisions.*; seeder script + 13 tests; idempotent upsert
body.description:
Read all existing lab/design_docs/decisions/D-*.md files and insert enriched nodes into palace.decisions.* with appropriate metadata (tags, status, spawned_tickets, date).

**Affected files:** new seeder script (reads D-*.md, writes to palace DB)
**Design rules:** palace DB always, files are echo only
**Scope boundary:** IN: read existing D-*.md stubs, insert palace.decisions.* nodes, set metadata.tags from filename/content inference. OUT: retroactive enrichment of decision narratives (that's manual/future work), context-load changes.
**Test plan:** all D-*.md files produce a palace.decisions.* node; queryable by tag and full-text.
